official_functions.role: Construct the official Login clientbound cookie_request packet fixture
Write the official Login clientbound cookie_request body
Write the full Login clientbound framed cookie_request packet
Dispatch and decode the full Login clientbound framed cookie_request packet
Name the packet id assigned in Login clientbound state
Read the decoded cookie_request key and confirm the Login listener cookie surface

invariants: The official Login clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the cookie_request body.
The official Login clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundCookieRequestPacket.
The official ClientboundCookieRequestPacket body is the cookie key as FriendlyByteBuf Identifier.
The decoded official ClientboundCookieRequestPacket preserves the Identifier key produced by the official fixture.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, key string, Login clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.

This contract does not prove cookie storage policy, cookie request/response runtime behavior, Login-to-Configuration state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer cookie storage policy, cookie request/response runtime behavior, Login-to-Configuration state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
